title: Resume Tailoring Agent
hook: Paste a JD. Get a tailored resume.
description: A multi-agent system that reads a job description, figures out what the role is actually looking for, and rewrites your resume to match. Four agents working in sequence: analyst, rewriter, cover letter writer, quality reviewer.
serves: Job seekers who want to stop sending the same generic resume to every application.

title: Cricket Score Bot
description: A cron daemon that checks live cricket data every 15 minutes, diffs against a local SQLite snapshot, and sends a Telegram alert only when something actually changed. Built because I got tired of refreshing Cricbuzz mid-match.
serves: Cricket fans who want relevant match alerts without constantly checking a live tab.

title: Flick Finder
hook: Search a movie. Get what you need.
description: A movie discovery app backed by the TMDB API. Type a title and get the rating, runtime, genres, cast and synopsis. Nothing more. Built because most movie apps bury the info you actually want.
serves: Anyone trying to quickly decide if a movie is worth watching without wading through bloated review sites.
